# Changelog

All notable changes to Keel are documented here.

Format follows [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com) +
[Conventional Commits](https://conventionalcommits.org).
Versioning follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org).

---

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- Initial repository bootstrap
- Proto contracts for agent-registry, task-broker, memory-service
- Agent registry domain model and services (domain layer)
- BDD feature files for all core agent-registry scenarios
- CI pipeline with lint, unit tests, security scan
- Docker Compose local development environment
- Helm chart templates for all services
- All ADRs (001-008) documenting architectural decisions
- CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, GOVERNANCE.md, ROADMAP.md
- AGENTS.md engineering contracts (root + per-service + per-layer)
